10Cr15CoMoV Clad Steel Stabilized Wood Handle Sujihiki 290 mm

This Sujihiki carving knife is a premium addition to any professional kitchen, designed for wholesale buyers seeking high-performance Japanese cutlery. The 290 mm blade is forged from 10Cr15CoMoV clad steel, a high-carbon stainless alloy known for its excellent edge retention, hardness, and corrosion resistance. This steel composition ensures the knife maintains a razor-sharp edge through heavy use, reducing the need for frequent sharpening in busy restaurant or catering environments. The clad construction provides a durable, stain-resistant finish that withstands the rigors of commercial kitchens.

The stabilized wood handle is ergonomically shaped to reduce hand fatigue during long carving sessions, offering a secure and comfortable grip even when wet. This Sujihiki excels at slicing cooked meats, roasts, poultry, and fish, delivering clean, precise cuts with minimal tearing. Its thin profile and elongated blade make it ideal for carving large portions, perfect for buffet lines and banquet services. As a wholesale product, this knife is available for bulk orders, allowing retailers and distributors to offer a high-quality Japanese carving knife to their professional clientele. The combination of advanced steel technology and traditional craftsmanship ensures reliable performance and long-lasting durability, making it a smart investment for any kitchen supply inventory.
